#labels Featured
= Introduction =

Welcome to the ProSE Wiki. Here you will find:

  * Project Vision and requirements [WikiSyntax#Wiki-style_markup]
  * Project design and key concepts
  * Developers guide
  * How to install, configure and run


== What problems are implemented and ready for use? ==

  # [WaterJugs Water-jugs problem]
  # [HanoiTower Tower of Hanoi]
  # [Rubik Rubik's cube]
  # Oil and tubes problem
  # [Missionaries Missionaries and cannibals problem]
  # [8Queens 8-Queens problem]
  # [8Puzzle 8-Puzzle problem]
  # [VacuumWorld Vacuum world problem]
  # [TravelingSalesperson Traveling salesperson problem]
  # [MapColoring Map coloring problem]
  # [BlocksWorld Blocks world problem]
  # [Sudoku Sudoku]
  # [AradBucharest Arad-Bucharest problem]

= Team =

  * Prof. Alexandre da Silva Simões (UNESP)
  * Prof. Esther Luna Colombini (UNESP/FEI)
